items.author: Omari Sankofa II

Halftime: Suns 53, Pistons 46. 

Williams (12 pts, 4-7 ovr, 3 assts, 0 turns) and Jones (12 pts, 5-7 ovr) have done the heavy lifting. Okorie (8 pts, 3-7 ovr, 2 assts, 2 turns) and Lanier (8 pts, 2-6 from 3) helped power their late run to cut a 17-point deficit.

Orlando holds off a strong push late by Philadelphia and improves to 3-1 in Las Vegas.

items.title: Timing of Argentina's winners in the knockout rounds:
items.author: Zach Kram
items.body_excerpt:
Timing of Argentina's winners in the knockout rounds:

vs. Cape Verde: 111th minute
vs. Egypt: 92nd minute (stoppage time)
vs. Switzerland: 112th minute
vs. England: 92nd minute (stoppage time)

They haven't led after 90 minutes of any knockout game. But they're in the final.

#Lakers Summer League team is undefeated in Las Vegas, and Cameron Carr wants to see them take home the championship.
lakersnation.com/cameron-carr...

media.title: Cameron Carr doesn't sugarcoat Lakers' Summer League goals
media.description: Cameron Carr laid out his and the Los Angeles Lakers' goals for the rest of Summer League after winning their first three games.
